name: James Agee
description: American author, journalist, poet, screenwriter and film critic (1909-1955)
abstract: James Rufus Agee ( AY-jee; November 27, 1909 – May 16, 1955) was an American novelist, journalist, poet, screenwriter and film critic. In the 1940s, writing for Time, he was one of the most influential film critics in the United States.

about_quotes.speaker: Dan Morgenstern
about_quotes.evidence: I would go and visit the advertising agencies and newspapers and go see somebody like James Agee in Greenwich Village.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dan Morgenstern — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
